title: Persona Design for a Virtual Reality Game Developer
scenario: Design a persona for a virtual reality game developer who is experienced in creating immersive gaming experiences and is looking to develop a new VR game that focuses on social interaction and multiplayer gameplay. The developer's name is Ethan, and they are 35 years old. The persona should include demographics, goals, challenges, and pain points. Ensure the persona is 200-500 words, written in the third person, and is focused on the developer's VR game development activities. Use a technical tone and a detailed style.
constraints: Must be written in the third person

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona description accurately reflect the provided context?
Is the tone of the persona description technical and professional?
Is the persona description within the specified word count range?
